title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2 and other large language models locally.

title: langchain-ai/langchain
summary: LangChain’s Ollama integration lets you call any model served locally through Ollama inside LangChain pipelines.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, push models with a simple API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node and browsers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface) with multi-model support.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive REPL and CLI wrapper around ollama with history and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community-maintained Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes clusters.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that brings Ollama completions, chat and code generation into the editor.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) demo using Ollama embeddings and LangChain.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot that forwards messages to a local Ollama instance and streams replies.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Official Docker images and compose files for CPU & GPU deployments of Ollama.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate providing async/sync bindings to the Ollama API.

title: ollama-chat-gradio
summary: Gradio UI template for chatting with any Ollama model in a shareable web app.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Lightweight Discord bot that queries your local Ollama instance for on-server chat.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API wrapper around Ollama for integrating local LLMs into web projects.
